sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἅρμα

- Transliteration: Harma

- Phonetic: har'-mah

- Definition:

1. a chariot

2. of war chariots (i.e. armed with scythes)

3. chariots (drawn with many horses)

- Origin: "probably from G142">142) [perhaps with 1 (as a particle of union) prefixed]"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Probably from G142 (perhaps with G1 (as a particle of union) prefixed); a chariot (as raised or fitted together (compare G719)): - chariot.
